title: announce: opportunistic_wait_time_ms allows negative rank producing negative wait time
description:
File: python/src/lichen/announce/coords.py:261-273

The opportunistic_wait_time_ms(rank) function does not validate that rank >= 0:

```python
def opportunistic_wait_time_ms(rank: int) -> int:
    return rank * OPPORTUNISTIC_SLOT_TIME_MS
```

If a negative rank is passed (e.g., rank=-1), this returns a negative wait time (-100ms), which could cause undefined behavior in callers that expect non-negative wait times.

Should add validation: if rank < 0: raise ValueError('rank must be non-negative')
